name: O-7 per-rule canary: promotion to block with an empty fp-log file (14 days clean) sets rule_state to block
command: mkdir -p tree rubric/fp-log && : > rubric/fp-log/g-ts-test.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/canary-promote.sh" --rule-id g-ts-test --to block --tree "$PWD/tree" --now 2026-05-30T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'rule_state: block' tree/google/x.yaml && echo promoted 1>&2
